title: Tech Stack

fields.label: Section Kicker
fields.name: section_kicker
fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the heading. Example: "Technologies"

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: section_heading
fields.instructions: H2 heading above the platform cards.

fields.label: Section Description
fields.name: section_description
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph beneath the heading. 2–3 sentences.
fields.default_value: We don't just use these platforms — we have built systems, automations and AI tooling on top of them. That depth translates directly into better outcomes for your project.
fields.placeholder: We don't just use these platforms…

fields.label: Primary Platforms
fields.name: platforms
fields.instructions: Add 2–6 primary platform cards. Each card shows a logo and a short description.

sub_fields.label: Platform Logo
sub_fields.name: platform_logo
sub_fields.instructions: Platform logo displayed inside the card. Recommended: transparent background, max 302×103px.

sub_fields.label: Platform Name
sub_fields.name: platform_name
sub_fields.instructions: Platform name — used as logo alt text if the image has no alt. Example: "WordPress"

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: platform_description
sub_fields.instructions: 2–3 sentence description of this platform and how Wordie uses it.
sub_fields.placeholder: Our primary build platform. Custom themes, Gutenberg block systems…

fields.label: Supporting Stack Label
fields.name: supporting_label
fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the supporting logos row.

fields.label: Supporting Stack Logos
fields.name: supporting_logos
fields.instructions: Add logos for the supporting technology row. 3–10 logos recommended.

sub_fields.label: Logo Image
sub_fields.name: logo_image
sub_fields.instructions: Logo image. Recommended: SVG or PNG with transparent background, max 200×60px.

sub_fields.label: Logo Alt Text
sub_fields.name: logo_alt
sub_fields.instructions: Accessible name for this logo. Example: "WP Engine"

description: Fields for the Tech Stack block.
